skills.name: You Wanna Go?
skills.description: Using Dave as a springboard, Harley leaps up and hurls her axe at the enemy. Grants self SPD Up for 2 turns and grants 3 stacks of Ignition to the Sun Attribute ally with the highest ATK. Reduces the enemy's Action Gauge by 25% with a 100% chance. DMG is proportional to self SPD.

DMG is proportional to self SPD.

skills.name: Chicken Race!
skills.description: Harley calls in the hog pack to charge forth. Grants all allies DEF Up for 2 turns. Grants all allies (excluding self) SPD Up for 1 turn with a 75% chance if self HP is 50% or above, and grants self Berserk Mode (Undispellable) for 3 turns if self HP is 50% or below. DMG is proportional to self SPD.

levels.description: Harley calls in the hog pack to charge forth. Grants all allies DEF Up for 2 turns. DMG is proportional to self SPD.
